top_signals.title: NY Knicks Success a Win for Lenders Who Propped Up Broadcaster
top_signals.summary: Just a year before the New York Knicks rode a double-digit winning streak to the NBA Finals, the company that broadcasts its games was thrown a lifeline to avoid a potential bankruptcy filing. Now, the lenders who backed that restructuring are likely cheering on the team’s success.
